description: Contains non-patent literature (NPL) citations such as scientific articles, books, and technical documents referenced in patent applications.

columns.name: npl_publn_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the non-patent literature publication.

columns.name: xp_nr
columns.description: Cross-reference number assigned by the patent office to the NPL citation.

columns.name: npl_type
columns.description: Type of non-patent literature (e.g., journal article, book, conference paper).

columns.name: npl_biblio
columns.description: Complete bibliographic citation text as it appears in the patent document.

columns.name: npl_author
columns.description: Author(s) of the non-patent literature publication.

columns.name: npl_title1
columns.description: Primary title of the non-patent literature publication.

columns.name: npl_title2
columns.description: Secondary title or subtitle of the publication.

columns.name: npl_editor
columns.description: Editor(s) of the publication (relevant for books and proceedings).

columns.name: npl_volume
columns.description: Volume number of the journal or book series.

columns.name: npl_issue
columns.description: Issue number of the journal or periodical.

columns.name: npl_publn_date
columns.description: Publication date of the non-patent literature.

columns.name: npl_publn_end_date
columns.description: End date for publications spanning multiple dates (e.g., conferences).

columns.name: npl_publisher
columns.description: Publisher of the non-patent literature.

columns.name: npl_page_first
columns.description: First page number of the article or chapter.

columns.name: npl_page_last
columns.description: Last page number of the article or chapter.

columns.name: npl_abstract_nr
columns.description: Abstract number if the publication is from an abstract database.

columns.name: npl_doi
columns.description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for electronic access to the publication.

columns.name: npl_isbn
columns.description: International Standard Book Number for book publications.

columns.name: npl_issn
columns.description: International Standard Serial Number for periodical publications.

columns.name: online_availability
columns.description: Information about online availability and access to the publication.

columns.name: online_classification
columns.description: Classification or categorization of the online resource.

columns.name: online_search_date
columns.description: Date when the online resource was searched or accessed.
